content: build a websiote on why fish live in water

mention why some live in fresh and some live in sat
I'd love to help, but I want to make sure I'm answering the right question — are you asking about fresh vs. salt water environments, fresh vs. saturated solutions, or something else?
why some fish live in salt water and whyy some fish live in fresh

Fish live in different waters because of osmosis—saltwater fish constantly lose water to their environment and must drink and excrete excess salt, while freshwater fish constantly gain water and must actively take in salts. Some fish like salmon are euryhaline and can handle both, but most are specialized for one environment.
